hero.title: Stop losing customers to slow responses
hero.description: 79% of customers leave if they don't get a response within 5 minutes. Varylo centralizes WhatsApp, Instagram and more in one inbox with AI that responds for you 24/7.

p1.title: Unanswered messages
p1.description: Your customers write on WhatsApp, Instagram and other channels. Your team can't keep up and messages get lost between platforms.

p2.title: Zero team visibility
p2.description: You don't know which agent responded what, how long they took, or if the response was good. You're managing blind.

p3.title: Limited hours
p3.description: Your team sleeps, but your customers don't. Every hour without a response is a lost sale and a customer going to the competition.

solution.title: The solution: everything in one place
solution.subtitle: Varylo connects all your channels, organizes your team and puts AI to work for you

features.title: Everything you need, nothing you don't
features.subtitle: Every feature is designed to solve a real problem in your operation

omnichannel.title: Unified inbox
omnichannel.description: WhatsApp, Instagram and more channels in one screen. No app switching, no lost messages, no chaos.

aiAgents.title: AI Agents that reply for you
aiAgents.description: Set up intelligent agents that understand your customers and respond automatically. When it gets complex, they transfer to your human team.

chatbots.title: Chatbots with smart flows
chatbots.description: Create interactive menus that guide customers step by step. No code, no hassle. The customer chooses, the chatbot resolves.

agents.title: Team management
agents.description: Auto-assign conversations, measure response times and monitor each agent's performance in real time.

analytics.title: Analytics that matter
analytics.description: Dashboards with conversation metrics, agent performance, tags and SLA. Data to make decisions, not just numbers.

ai.title: ValerIA: your quality assistant
ai.description: Our AI analyzes tone, clarity and sentiment in every conversation. Detects problems before they escalate.

how.title: Works in 3 steps
how.subtitle: From zero to serving customers in under 10 minutes

step1.title: Create your account
step1.description: Sign up, choose a plan and set up your company. No credit card required.

step2.title: Connect your channels
step2.description: Link WhatsApp and Instagram in minutes. Activate your AI agents and chatbots.

step3.title: Start selling more
step3.description: Your team responds from a unified inbox while AI handles the rest.

t1.text: We used to take hours to respond. With Varylo we reply in minutes and our customers notice.
t1.author: Maria Gonzalez

t2.text: The AI agent resolves 60% of inquiries without human intervention. It's like having an employee that never rests.
t2.author: Carlos Ramirez

t3.text: Chatbots saved us from hiring 2 more people. The ROI was immediate.
t3.author: Laura Martinez

starter.title: Starter
starter.description: For entrepreneurs looking to professionalize their support

pro.title: Pro
pro.description: For teams that need AI and more control

scale.title: Scale
scale.description: For large operations that need everything

q1.question: Do I need a WhatsApp Business API?
q1.answer: Yes, Varylo connects to Meta's Cloud API. We guide you step by step through setup, it takes less than 10 minutes.

q2.question: Can I change my plan later?
q2.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time from your dashboard. No penalties.

q3.question: Does AI read all my messages?
q3.answer: Only when you activate analysis features. Your data is encrypted and never shared with third parties.

q4.question: What happens if the AI agent can't answer?
q4.answer: It automatically transfers to a human agent on your team. The customer never goes unattended.

q5.question: How long does integration take?
q5.answer: Less than 10 minutes to connect WhatsApp. You can have your first chatbot running in under an hour.

cta.title: Stop losing customers today
cta.subtitle: Join the companies already multiplying their sales with Varylo. Start free, no credit card required.
